ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice - Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Team,

This is a friendly reminder that your subscription to XYZ SaaS platform is set to renew on 30th April 2026. Please review the renewal details below:

• Plan: Premium Plus
• Amount: INR 15,000 per month
• Renewal Date: 30-Apr-2026

To continue uninterrupted service, simply log in to your account and confirm the renewal. If you would like to make any changes to your plan or billing information, please do so before the renewal date.

Access your account here: <URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to our support team at support@xyzsaas.com.

Thank you for choosing XYZ SaaS. We appreciate your continued partnership.

Best regards,
XYZ SaaS Support Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required - Gift Card Request from CEO
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to you in my capacity as the CEO of ABC Corp. Due to an urgent corporate event, I need to issue a gift card to our top performer. However, our internal system is down and I am unable to process the request through the usual channels.

Please send an INR 5,000 gift card to the following account details:

• Name: Raj Patel
• Bank: State Bank of India
• Account Number: 1234567890
• IFSC: SBIN0001234

Time is of the essence. If the gift card is not processed within the next 3 hours, the employee’s performance bonus will be at risk. To expedite, simply click the link below to confirm the transaction:

<URL>

Your prompt action will be greatly appreciated and will ensure that our employee receives the deserved recognition on time.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Rajesh Kumar
CEO, ABC Corp
